# novu_environment (Data Source)

Environment data source. Get any environment within the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "novu_environment" "example-development" {
  is_production = false
  name          = "Development"
}

data "novu_environment" "example-child-environment" {
  parent_environment_id = data.novu_environment.example-development.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The environment id
- `identifier` (String) The environment identifier
- `is_production` (Boolean) Whether it is the production environment
- `name` (String) The environment name
- `parent_environment_id` (String) The environment's parent id
- `slug` (String) The environment's slug
